title: Manakkattu devi temple
tagline: Manakkattu devi temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Manakkattu Devi Temple is a temple in Kerala.
overview.description: Manakkattu Devi Temple is a temple in Kerala. The temple is located at Pallippad in Karthikappalli taluk of Alappuzha district in the south Indian state Kerala. It is situated about 4 km east of Harippad on Nangiarkulangara Mavelikkara road.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Cheppad
topPlaces.description: Cheppad is a scenic village near Haripad in Alappuzha district in Kerala State, India. It is about halfway between Kochi and Thiruvananthapuram on the National Highway 47 (now NH 66).

topPlaces.name: Nangiarkulangara
topPlaces.description: Nangiarkulangara is a relatively small town situated near Haripad, Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. The area postal pin code is 690513.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kayamkulam
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, NTPC Kayamkulam is located in Cheppad, Haripad. Affiliated to CBSE, this school started operating on 28 July 1999.

topPlaces.name: Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad
topPlaces.description: Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad near Harippad, Alappuzha, Kerala is one of the oldest temples in Kerala.This temple is dedicated to Durga Devi and the goddess is also known as Karthiyayini Devi.

topPlaces.name: Evoor Major Sri Krishnaswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Evoor Major Srikrishnaswamy temple is a Krishna temple in Evoor near Haripad, in Alappuzha, Kerala. It is said to have originated five millennium ago following Khandava Dahanam.

topPlaces.name: Karthikappally
topPlaces.description: Karthikappally is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Haripad is the headquarter of Karthikappally Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Haripad Sree Subrahmanya Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: The Sree Subrahmanya Swamy Temple (Perumthrikkovil), also known as Kerala Palani or Dakshina Palani (lit. 'Southern Palani'), in Haripad, Kerala, is one of the oldest and largest temples in the region. According to belief, the temple predates the beginning of the Kali Yuga.

topPlaces.name: Valiyaperumpuzha
topPlaces.description: Valiyaperumpuzha is a village situated in Mavelikkara, on the banks of the Achankovil river, in between Mavelikkara Municipality, Chennithala Panchayat, and Chettikulangara Panchayat in Kerala, India. Valiyaperumpuzha is situated 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) north of Thattarambalanm Junction.

items.note: Cheppad is a scenic village near Haripad in Alappuzha district in Kerala State, India. It is about halfway between Kochi and Thiruvananthapuram on the National Highway 47 (now NH 66).
Nangiarkulangara is a relatively small town situated near Haripad, Alappuzha district in the state of Kerala, India. The area postal pin code is 690513.
Kendriya Vidyalaya, NTPC Kayamkulam is located in Cheppad, Haripad. Affiliated to CBSE, this school started operating on 28 July 1999.

Evoor Major Srikrishnaswamy temple is a Krishna temple in Evoor near Haripad, in Alappuzha, Kerala. It is said to have originated five millennium ago following Khandava Dahanam.
Karthikappally is a village in Alappuzha district in the Indian state of Kerala. Haripad is the headquarter of Karthikappally Taluk.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Haripad Sree Subrahmanya Swamy Temple & around

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Manakkattu devi temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Manakkattu devi temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Manakkattu devi temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (99 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Manakkattu devi temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Manakkattu devi temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Manakkattu devi temple?
faq.a: Stays in Manakkattu devi temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Manakkattu devi temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Cheppad, Nangiarkulangara, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Kayamkulam, Vettikulangara Devi Temple Cheppad, Evoor Major Sri Krishnaswamy Temple.
